prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2300 TVS supercharger kit (replacing the stock AJ-V8 Gen III 4.2L supercharger) with a custom pulley reduction to 2.75" for 12-14 PSI boost, paired with a Lingenfelter ported throttle body and a custom heat exchanger from Setrab (45-row core) to manage intake temps on the AJ34 engine code

Full fuel system overhaul with Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to prevent oil dilution in the direct-injection system, alongside a Motec M150 ECU for precise AFR targeting (11.8:1 under full load)

Suspension replacement with KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (8-position rebound, 12-position compression, adjustable camber plates) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1305K) for the rear subframe, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front calipers (355mm discs) and 4-piston rears (330mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Prior Design PD800R kit (OEM+ fitment with extended fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser), including a custom 3D-printed rear spoiler with Gurney flap (25mm height) for downforce optimization at 150+ mph

Custom interior retrim with Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats (heated/ventilated, Schroth 6-point harnesses), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (including center console) from Carbonskins, paired with a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" OLED)

Exterior lighting upgrade to LUX V3 HID projectors (5500K) with custom DRL halos (RGBW, controlled via Arduino), sequential LED taillights (VLEDS 72-SMART), and a custom titanium exhaust tip setup (2.5" dual outlets, polished finish) from Remus
